[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''D'Arc Vaetes''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] surgeon who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he was the maximum military authority in the RMSU-7. He survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces against the medical center, and the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|RMSU]] was moved to a new location. When the Republic forces discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|bota]] had no use any more, D'Arc and the whole personnel left Drongar.

{{Char-stub}}
